codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the original collision bug. Entity graph nodes and edges now use typed ids, the entity explorer resolves selections by typed identity, and regression tests cover same-label cross-type entities through extraction, filtering, and related-event lookup paths.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill should explicitly allow pure logic/data-transform fixes with direct automated coverage to satisfy verification without requiring agent-browser runs when there is no meaningful user-surface interaction to exercise.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The fix-entity-graph-type-collision handoff reports a pure logic/data-transform repair in src/utils/entityGraph.js plus targeted tests in test/entityGraph.test.js; the worker's skillFeedback notes that browser automation was unnecessary because the expected behavior was fully covered by the added automated checks.

summary: Pass. The original same-label cross-type collision is fixed end-to-end by typed entity ids and regression coverage.
